title: (Bullish Signal) SRNE, Moving Average Convergence Divergence Histogram just turned positive
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
This is a Bullish indicator signaling SRNE's price could rise from here. Traders may explore going long the stock or buying call options. Tickeron's A.I.dvisor identified 46 similar cases where SRNE's MACD histogram became positive, and 40 of them led to successful outcomes. Odds of Success: 87%. Current price $9.86 crossed the resistance line at $10.26 and is trading between $10.26 resistance and $8.95 support lines. Throughout the month of 02/11/21 - 03/16/21, the price experienced a -32% Downtrend, while the week of 03/09/21 - 03/16/21 shows a +4% Uptrend.

https://preview.redd.it/bkyk420s4nn61.png?width=1533&format=png&auto=webp&s=3769832cad4d53c42d859434d9152b5ec4317550

**Bullish Trend Analysis**

The RSI Oscillator points to a transition from a downward trend to an upward trend -- in cases where SRNE's RSI Oscillator exited the oversold zone, 30 of 36 resulted in an increase in price. Tickeron's analysis proposes that the odds of a continued upward trend are 83%.

The Momentum Indicator moved above the 0 level on March 11, 2021. You may want to consider a long position or call options on SRNE as a result. Tikeron A.I. detected that in 76 of 88 past instances where the momentum indicator moved above 0, the stock continued to climb. The odds of a continued upward trend are 86%.

Following a +18.78% 3-day Advance, the price is estimated to grow further. Considering data from situations where SRNE advanced for three days, in 180 of 210 cases, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 86%.

SRNE may jump back above the lower band and head toward the middle band. Traders may consider buying the stock or exploring call options.
